description_long: This is an adult woman with a medium build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a casual, fitted blazer over a top, paired with cropped pants that end just below the knee. Her feet are clad in low-heeled shoes, and she wears a wristwatch on her left wrist. Her hair is styled in a neat bun at the back of her head, secured with a visible hair tie. The facial features are defined, and the overall appearance is clean and well-groomed, suitable for an urban or professional setting. The clothing and accessories suggest a modern, everyday look for city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult woman in a blazer and cropped pants, standing upright with arms outstretched. She has a neat bun hairstyle and wears low-heeled shoes and a wristwatch.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, blazer, top, wristwatch, and full T-pose arm extension.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, bun hairstyle, and the side silhouette of the outfit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blazer, pants, and the bun hairstyle with hair tie.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, similar to the left, with visible shoe and arm extension.
attribute_clothing_type: casual blazer over a top with cropped pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair styled in a bun
